text:
Story Quest

In Story Quest, you can experience Greed Adventure's original story. Play through story skits and battle quests.

Recollection Quest

In Recollection Quest, you can experience the original work (2011 anime). This includes both story skits and battle quests.

Events

In Events, you can battle various opponents throughout the week. A special character will always be available for a certain time period before being replaced with another character (Advent Quest). Two to three other characters will be available to battle in a day at a time (VS Quest). All characters will be available to battle on Sundays (JST).

Advent Quests

The Advents are found under the Events tab. For these quests, a special character is available during every individual time period.

Previous Advents

VS Quest

VS Quests are found under the Events tab. Two or more characters are available to battle within a given day. All characters will be available to battle on Sundays (JST).
Mondays and Thursdays: Rapid Dog (Enhancement) & Binolt (Specialization)
Tuesdays and Fridays: Hisoka (Transmutation) & Shalnark (Manipulation)
Wednesdays and Saturdays: Shizuku (Conjuration), Franklin (Emission), & Gotoh (Unknown)
VS Quest Clear Award: Limit Break Resources (Type of Limit Break Resources depends on the Nen type of the VS Quest Character)

There are also limited time VS Quests against the 3 Star playable characters: Gon, Killua, and Kurapika.

Jenny Hunt

Jenny Hunt is found under the Events tab. You are allowed to beat up to 50 enemies. Slimes have a chance to drop 300 jenny. Sometimes you can see a cat, if you beat him you will get 1000 jenny.

Phantom Hunting Arena

The Phantom Hunting Arena is found under the Events tab. In this mode you can get G stones as clear rewards and certain skill cards and EXP cards as drops. They are also for obtaining certain S rank skill cards.

Challenge Quest

Challenge Quest is a mode composed of multiple high difficulty boss battles. In this mode, you aren't allowed to play with other players.

It will be unlocked once you complete Chapter 4 on hard difficulty of Story Quest.

Clear rewards can either be shards for a certain character or awakening shards.

Levels

Tonpa
Reward: 20 shards for Feitan - The Flash Corpse Robber
Biscuit
Reward: Awakening Shard x1
Binolt
Reward: Awakening shard x1
Zushi
Reward: 20 shards for Nobunaga - Iai Master
Uvogin
Reward: Awakening shard x1

Tower Quest

Tower Quest is a ranked mode that takes place in Tower of Trials, a tower in G.I.2. It is composed of multiple high difficulty battles. In this mode, you aren't allowed to play with other players.

Clear rewards can be shards for a certain character, awakening shards, EXP cards, Jenny or G stones.

On each floor, there are special effects. Players must adjust their team accordingly to counter each boss. Rankings are based on the highest floor you reached and your clear time.

Heavens Arena

Heavens Arena is a ranked mode where you can fight against other players' teams.

Whenever you fight, you get points depending on your results, clear time, characters remaining, etc.

You also get Battle Coins after each battle and when your defense team wins. These coins can be used to buy various goods at the shop.

You can only do 5 fights per day.
